name: General Tso's Chicken - Real Thing
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Chicken (dark meat, boneless, cut into chunks)
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the sauce, mix cornstarch and water together. Add garlic, ginger, sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, and sherry. Then add broth and MSG, stirring until the sugar dissolves. Refrigerate until ready to use.
2. In a separate bowl, mix chicken, soy sauce, and pepper. Stir in egg. Add cornstarch mixture until the chicken is coated evenly.
3. Heat oil in a wok until hot. Divide the chicken into small quantities and deep-fry at 350°F (175°C) until crispy and light brown. Do not overcook; watch the temperature to prevent the meat from toughening. Drain on paper towels.
4. Add onions and peppers to the hot oil in the wok and stir-fry briefly (peppers may release acrid smoke, so be careful).
5. Stir in the sauce and add the chicken. Cook until the sauce thickens. If needed, add water or a mixture of water and cornstarch to achieve the desired consistency.
6. This recipe serves 6-8 people and pairs well with white steamed rice.
